title: Move a single sub-item from one board to another board
excerpt: There needs to be functionality to select a single sub-item (not an item and all of the sub-items under an item) and move that one sub-item to a different board without the added steps of converting the sub-item to an it…

posts.author: jenniferc (Jennifer Cunningham)
posts.cookedHtml: There needs to be functionality to select a single sub-item (not an item and all of the sub-items under an item) and move that one sub-item to a different board without the added steps of converting the sub-item to an item, moving to a different board, and then converting back to a sub-item.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jenniferc

We developed an app called subitem automations that provides robust automation capabilities to subitems. It also includes the ability to move subitems between boards, here’s an example →

Screenshot 2024-03-05 at 16.49.332134×432 52.1 KB

You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

Hope that helps!

posts.author: jenniferc (Jennifer Cunningham)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for sending this to me. While I can see that would certainly help, this should be basic functionality and not accessible only through a paid app.
